rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 12, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Nationstar Mortgage Llc And Wells Fargo Bank, National Association As Trustees Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is continued to April 23, 2020 on Court's own motion. If parties stipulate to a different hearing date after April 23, 2020, parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on March 12, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN DORGAN VS. EDWARD CHUTE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 12, 2020 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT KEVIN DORGAN MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to April 17, 2020. rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Filed In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 12, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT SANTOS & URRUTIA ASSOCIATES, INC., RODRIGO SANTOS, ALBERT URRUTIA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Filed In Support Of Plaintiffs Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendants' Motion is GRANTED as to redacting third-party names and amounts paid by third-parties in Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint as well as Exhibits 76-92. Defendants' Motion is DENIED as to all other redacted portions of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOMEI FENG ET AL VS. JIAWEI JIAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 12, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT JIAWEI JIAN Amended Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer; Proof Of Service is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege fraud with requisite specificity; (2) allege all elements of the cause of action for quiet title; (3) allege what amounts, if any, provided to the defendants were to be used as an investment (i.e. towards Plaintiffs' alleged ownership claim, partial or otherwise) and what amounts were to be used as a loan (i.e. to be repaid by Defendants). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/SKF)
